mdSummary:
# PickList

Two-column shuttle picker — move items between lists.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Dashboard
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/pick-list

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PickList | Items | `IEnumerable<TItem>` | `[]` |  |
| PickList | SelectedItems | `IEnumerable<TItem>` | `[]` |  |
| PickList | SelectedItemsChanged | `EventCallback<IEnumerable<TItem>>` | `` |  |
| PickList | ItemTemplate | `RenderFragment<TItem>?` | `` |  |
| PickList | SourceTitle | `string` | `"Available"` |  |
| PickList | TargetTitle | `string` | `"Selected"` |  |
| PickList | ShowSearch | `bool` | `true` |  |
| PickList | Height | `string` | `"320px"` |  |
| PickList | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| PickList | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ItemTemplate` (PickList) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `SelectedItemsChanged` (`EventCallback<IEnumerable<TItem>>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<PickList />
```
